prestazioni: Engine swap to a J35Y6 (3.5L V6 Earth Dreams) with a custom forced-induction setup using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, paired with a PRL Motorsports J35A/J37 hybrid intake manifold and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a Tomei 4-2-1 header and a custom 3-inch downpipe with a GReddy Profec E-02 electronic boost controller

Full K-Tuned J35Y6 engine management system with a Hondata KPro V4 ECU reflash, optimized for E85 fuel with a custom fuel system upgrade including Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup for crankcase ventilation

Custom KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping and camber plates, paired with a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm) and a Cusco rear sway bar (22mm), along with a full polybush kit from Energy Suspension and a custom subframe brace from Hasport Performance
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny RB3-specific widebody kit with custom carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom rear diffuser, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood and a custom carbon fiber roof panel

Custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap with a full vinyl overlay featuring a custom JDM-inspired livery by VViViD Graphics, including a custom front lip spoiler from J's Racing and a custom rear wing from Voltex (Type 3)

Custom interior overhaul featuring Recaro Pole Position seats with custom red Alcantara upholstery, a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub, and a full custom roll cage from Custom Cages UK, painted in gloss black with red accents
